center.name: 艾森大区
center.summary: 艾森大区是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联9种鸟类，包括智利斑䳍、Chilean pigeon、Slender-billed parakeet等9种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Chilean pigeon is found in its namesake country from the Coquimbo Region south to the Aysén Region and in Argentina immediately adjoining the southern half of its Chilean range

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in south-central Chile between the Atacama and Aysén regions and in adjacent western Argentina between Mendoza Province and Santa Cruz Province

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: fortis is found in far southern Chile's Aysén and Magallanes regions and in southern Argentina from southern Neuquén Province south into Tierra del Fuego

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies of the plain-mantled tit-spinetail is found in central Chile between the Coquimbo and Aysén regions

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: hoyi, western Argentina between La Rioja and Neuquén provinces and in southern Chile's Aysén Region The rufous-banded miner inhabits several open landscapes: puna grassland, arid montane scrublands, dry rocky slopes, flat areas with scattered vegetation, and also dry riverbeds

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The slender-billed parakeet is endemic to central Chile between the Santiago Metropolitan Region and Los Lagos Region; it also occurs in the Aysén Region, but rarely, and has been recorded as a vagrant in Argentina.Remsen, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: minor is found in southern Chile from the O'Higgins Region south to Aysén and in adjoining southwestern Argentina from Neuquén Province to northwestern Santa Cruz

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It also is separately found in western Chile between the Atacama and Aysén regions

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This species is native to all of Chile except southern Los Lagos, Tarapacá, Antofagasta, Aisén, and Magallanes y Antarctica Chilena. This tinamou can also be found in arid mountain forests in association with such trees as Acacia caven, Porlieria chilensis and the endangered Jubaea chilensis. It has been introduced to Easter Island.Jaramillo, A
